paper_title: Fact, Fetch, and Reason: A Unified Evaluation of Retrieval-Augmented Generation
evaluation_method: LLM-as-judge accuracy evaluation. FRAMES contains 824 challenging multi-hop questions requiring integration of information from 2-15 Wikipedia articles. Since gold answers are free-form text (not multiple choice), an LLM judge evaluates whether the model's output matches the gold answer. The auto-rating mechanism was validated against human evaluations, achieving accuracy of 0.96 and Cohen's Kappa of 0.889 using Gemini-Pro-1.5-0514 as the autorating LLM.
